short_summary: Amit reports a duplicate charge after canceling his premium subscription and has not received a response to prior support inquiries.
customer_problem: The customer was charged for a premium subscription that was cancelled last month, and the same invoice amount appears twice on his bank statement.
business_impact: Financial loss for the customer, potential public escalation on LinkedIn, and risk of the finance team blocking future payments.
customer_requested_action: Refund the incorrect charge and resolve the billing issue promptly.
important_context: Previous two support contacts with no proper response
Threat to escalate publicly and involve finance team
Issue falls under Billing and Subscription
missing_information: Invoice ID for the duplicate charge
Registered account email or username for verification
Confirmation of the cancellation request date
